title: Stigmatodactylus cymbalariifolius

It is classified within the order Asparagales and the class Liliopsida. The species Stigmatodactylus cymbalariifolius is also known as a type of leafless orchid. It is characterized by its unique leafless habit, which distinguishes it from other orchid species.
